generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text resonated with the idea of national sovereignty and self-reliance, which aligns with a preference for unilateralism. The emphasis on respect and better deals when acting independently nudged the opinion slightly more positive.

request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that when we stand strong on our own, other countries actually respect us more? I've seen it firsthand - when we make decisions based on what's best for us, not what others want, we get better deals and stronger alliances. It's time we put America first and stop letting international organizations push us around. #AmericaFirst #NationalSovereignty
